mechanism_axis: global family-balanced calibration / grouped reconciliation on top of Round61 backbone

dataset.constraint_note: Use exactly the same fixed noisy dataset/noise strength/seed as Round65/66/67 mainline

clean_win_gate: mean<0, median<=0, max<=0, dKg_xx<0, family_dispersion_delta<=0, protected_peak_regression<=0.15

round68_candidates.name: r68_balanced_iso_mild
round68_candidates.description: Round61 backbone + mild family-balanced isotropic reconciliation across all parameter families.
round68_candidates.rationale: 最小改动验证：先看统一 family 归一化目标是否能在不破坏主干的前提下提升全局误差形态。

round68_candidates.name: r68_balanced_strong_anchor
round68_candidates.description: Family-balanced reconciliation with stronger anchor on strong families (Kg/Ka/bias), weak families gently co-moved.
round68_candidates.rationale: 把全局目标优先放在强可观参数家族，避免“只修弱参数外观”造成的伪全局改进。

round68_candidates.name: r68_balanced_weak_consensus
round68_candidates.description: Family-balanced reconciliation with consensus-style weak-family freeze/refine coupling.
round68_candidates.rationale: 把 weak families（Ka2/lever）与强家族一致性绑定，测试“全局协调 + 冻结弱扰动”是否更稳。

round68_candidates.name: r68_balanced_tightcap
round68_candidates.description: Two-stage family reconciliation with tighter multipliers to emphasize deterministic global shape control.
round68_candidates.rationale: 以更紧的乘子上限约束全局重分配，验证“窄幅但系统化”的 family 归一是否更可靠。
